data_processing: Bioconductor software package lumi. The data provided is log2 transformed.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from the non-infected dendritic_cells and the MTB-infected dendritic_cells using the miRNeasy kit (Qiagen).
growth_protocol_ch1: Blood monocytes were purified from PBMCs by positive selection with magnetic CD14 MicroBeads. In order to derive dendritic cells, monocytes were cultured for 5 days in RPMI 1640  supplemented with 10% heat-inactivated FCS , L-glutamina, GM-CSF (20 ng/ml; Immunotools), and IL-4 (20 ng/ml; Immunotools). Cell cultures were fed every 2 days with complete medium supplemented with the cytokines previously mentioned.

data_processing: Bioconductor software package lumi. The data provided is log2 transformed.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from the non-infected dendritic_cells and the MTB-infected dendritic_cells using the miRNeasy kit (Qiagen).
growth_protocol_ch1: Blood monocytes were purified from PBMCs by positive selection with magnetic CD14 MicroBeads. In order to derive dendritic cells, monocytes were cultured for 5 days in RPMI 1640  supplemented with 10% heat-inactivated FCS , L-glutamina, GM-CSF (20 ng/ml; Immunotools), and IL-4 (20 ng/ml; Immunotools). Cell cultures were fed every 2 days with complete medium supplemented with the cytokines previously mentioned.

extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted from the non-infected dendritic_cells and the MTB-infected dendritic_cells using the miRNeasy kit (Qiagen).
growth_protocol_ch1: Blood monocytes were purified from PBMCs by positive selection with magnetic CD14 MicroBeads. In order to derive dendritic cells, monocytes were cultured for 5 days in RPMI 1640  supplemented with 10% heat-inactivated FCS , L-glutamina, GM-CSF (20 ng/ml; Immunotools), and IL-4 (20 ng/ml; Immunotools). Cell cultures were fed every 2 days with complete medium supplemented with the cytokines previously mentioned.

growth_protocol_ch1: Blood monocytes were purified from PBMCs by positive selection with magnetic CD14 MicroBeads. In order to derive dendritic cells, monocytes were cultured for 5 days in RPMI 1640  supplemented with 10% heat-inactivated FCS , L-glutamina, GM-CSF (20 ng/ml; Immunotools), and IL-4 (20 ng/ml; Immunotools). Cell cultures were fed every 2 days with complete medium supplemented with the cytokines previously mentioned.
title: dendritic_cells ID78 MTB-infected rep_2
treatment_protocol_ch1: We infected dendritic_cells with an MTB strain expressing green-fluorescent protein (H37Rv)
